characteristics.name: Functional suitability
characteristics.description: Degree to which a product provides functions that meet stated and implied needs when used under specified conditions.

subcharacteristics.name: Functional completeness
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which the set of functions covers all specified tasks and user objectives.

subcharacteristics.name: Functional correctness
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product provides correct results with the needed degree of precision.

subcharacteristics.name: Functional appropriateness
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which functions facilitate the accomplishment of specified tasks and objectives.

characteristics.name: Performance efficiency
characteristics.description: Performance relative to the amount of resources used under stated conditions.

subcharacteristics.name: Time behaviour
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which response time, processing time and throughput meet requirements.

subcharacteristics.name: Resource utilization
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which the amounts and types of resources used meet requirements.

subcharacteristics.name: Capacity
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which maximum limits of parameters meet requirements.

characteristics.name: Compatibility
characteristics.description: Degree to which a product can exchange information with other products and perform required functions while sharing the same environment.

subcharacteristics.name: Co-existence
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can perform required functions efficiently while sharing a common environment and resources.

subcharacteristics.name: Interoperability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which products can exchange information and use exchanged information.

characteristics.name: Interaction capability
characteristics.description: Degree to which a product enables users to interact effectively, efficiently and satisfactorily.

subcharacteristics.name: Appropriateness recognizability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which users can recognize whether a product is appropriate for their needs.

subcharacteristics.name: Learnability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can be used by specified users to achieve specified learning goals.

subcharacteristics.name: Operability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product has attributes that make it easy to operate and control.

subcharacteristics.name: User error protection
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product protects users against making errors.

subcharacteristics.name: User engagement
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product presents functions and information in an engaging manner.

subcharacteristics.name: Inclusivity
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can be used by people with varied backgrounds and abilities.

subcharacteristics.name: User assistance
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can be used by specified users to achieve specified goals with assistance.

subcharacteristics.name: Self-descriptiveness
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product presents information that makes its capabilities and use evident to users.

characteristics.name: Reliability
characteristics.description: Degree to which a product performs specified functions under specified conditions for a specified period of time.

subcharacteristics.name: Faultlessness
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product performs specified functions without fault under normal operation.

subcharacteristics.name: Availability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product is operational and accessible when required for use.

subcharacteristics.name: Fault tolerance
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product operates as intended despite hardware or software faults.

subcharacteristics.name: Recoverability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can recover affected data and re-establish desired system state after interruption or failure.

characteristics.name: Security
characteristics.description: Degree to which a product protects information and data so that persons or other products have the degree of data access appropriate to their types and levels of authorization.

subcharacteristics.name: Confidentiality
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which data is accessible only to those authorized to have access.

subcharacteristics.name: Integrity
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which data and system state are protected from unauthorized modification.

subcharacteristics.name: Non-repudiation
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which actions or events can be proven to have taken place.

subcharacteristics.name: Accountability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which actions of an entity can be traced uniquely to that entity.

subcharacteristics.name: Authenticity
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which the identity of a subject or resource can be proved to be the one claimed.

subcharacteristics.name: Resistance
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can resist attacks according to defined threat assumptions.

characteristics.name: Maintainability
characteristics.description: Degree of effectiveness and efficiency with which a product can be modified by intended maintainers.

subcharacteristics.name: Modularity
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product is composed of discrete components so that change has minimal impact.

subcharacteristics.name: Reusability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which an asset can be used in more than one system or product.

subcharacteristics.name: Analysability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which it is possible to assess impact, diagnose deficiencies or identify parts to modify.

subcharacteristics.name: Modifiability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can be modified without introducing defects or degrading quality.

subcharacteristics.name: Testability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which test criteria can be established and tests can be performed effectively.

characteristics.name: Flexibility
characteristics.description: Degree to which a product can be adapted, scaled, installed or replaced for use in different contexts.

subcharacteristics.name: Adaptability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can be adapted for different environments or use contexts.

subcharacteristics.name: Scalability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can handle changes in workload or capacity needs.

subcharacteristics.name: Installability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can be successfully installed or uninstalled.

subcharacteristics.name: Replaceability
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product can replace or be replaced by another product for the same purpose.

characteristics.name: Safety
characteristics.description: Degree to which a product does not endanger human life, health, property or the environment.

subcharacteristics.name: Operational constraint
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product operates within conditions that reduce risk.

subcharacteristics.name: Risk identification
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product supports identification of hazards and risky situations.

subcharacteristics.name: Fail safe
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product enters or maintains a safe state when failures occur.

subcharacteristics.name: Hazard warning
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product warns users or systems about hazardous situations.

subcharacteristics.name: Safe integration
subcharacteristics.description: Degree to which a product remains safe when integrated with other products or systems.
